headline: REGENXBIO Presents Positive Long-Term Data for Surabgene Lomparvovec in Wet AMD and Diabetic Retinopathy at American Society of Retina Specialists Annual Meeting
summary: REGENXBIO Inc. (Nasdaq: RGNX) today announced positive data from long-term follow-up studies of investigational surabgene lomparvovec (sura-vec, ABBV-RGX-314) in wet AMD using subretinal delivery and diabetic retinopathy (DR) using suprachoroidal delivery. These new data were presented at the American Society of Retina Specialists (ASRS) 44th Annual Meeting in Montreal, Canada.
